---
title: "6. Meta-Analisi Bayesiane"
author: "[Massimiliano Pastore](https://dpss.psy.unipd.it/~massimiliano.pastore/index.html)"
date: 06.05.2026
---

<br>

Slide sulle meta-analisi bayesiane

<a href="slides/meta-analisi-bayes.pdf" download="meta-analisi-bayes.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Scarica Slides (pdf)
